name: FIRST INTERSTATE BANCSYSTEM INC
summary: Our Company We are a financial and bank holding company focused on community banking. Since our incorporation in Montana in 1971, we have grown both organically and through strategic acquisitions. As of February 20, 2026, we operated 290 banking offices, including branches and detached drive-up facilities, in communities across 12 states Colorado, Idaho, Iowa, Minnesota, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Oregon, South Dakota, Washington, and Wyoming.
